description: Garchomp's standard game plan is to bank Earth Power energy and pivot into Zacian; Garchomp softens steels and bulky picks while Zacian (run with Best Buddy Boost at level 51 for the CMP edge) cleans up and provides a hard check to Dialga.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *BUFFED* Mega Garchomp is DOMINANT in Mega Masters! 2696 ELO!! | Pokemon GO PvP

description: The creator explicitly calls Palkia + Zacian the 'Pulkazian core' — the common supporting cast around Mega Mewtwo Y. Palkia applies fast Spatial Rend/Aqua Tail pressure and energy generation while Zacian Crowned Sword closes with Behemoth Blade and Close Combat, the pairing defining the Mega Master League meta.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *HUNDO* MEGA MEWTWO Y has arrived in the Mega Master League! | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: Two fairy types in the back that together neutralize the dragons Garchomp struggles against (e.g. Mega Rayquaza), with Xerneas surviving big hits like Dragon Ascent and Moongeist Beam to secure late-game wins.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
